page_content:
Corequisite: MUSC606 and MUSC604.

Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Music - Doctoral (Doctoral); Music - Master (Master's)) ; and permission of Director of Opera required.

MUSC620 Analysis of World Music (3 Credits) Development of skills for auditory analysis of diverse musical systems. Recommended: Completion of a seminar in transcription.
